title: Token-opt: phase retry resumes the SAME CLI session (claude --resume) instead of fresh-booting — a retry today re-pays system prompt + instructions + exploration
summary: Orchestrator retry loop (cyclerun_dispatch.go:164-171) re-dispatches fresh; with the session id captured by S1/S3 telemetry, retries of the same phase resume the prior session (its context is already cache-read). Fall back to fresh boot when the session is stale past the 5-min cache TTL (a stale resume is a FULL cache miss — worse than fresh; papers 2.7). GATED: defer until token-telemetry-s7 ships (measured baseline re-ranks these by actual top consumers). Research: knowledge-base/research/token-concurrency-2026/ (oss.md 15, papers.md 2.7).
acceptance: Retry dispatches carry --resume with the prior session id when within TTL; fresh boot beyond TTL (test both)
measured input tokens on retried phases drop vs baseline
